name.ja: <ruby>朽<rt>く</rt></ruby>ちた<ruby>祭<rt>さい</rt></ruby><ruby>儀<rt>ぎ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt>よう</rt></ruby><ruby>録<rt>ろく</rt></ruby>

text.en: Reveal 1 Ritual Spell in your hand or Deck, and add 1 monster that mentions it from your Deck to your hand. If a face-up Ritual Monster(s) you control leaves the field by card effect while this card is in your GY, and you control no face-up non-Ritual Monsters: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Corrupted Ritual Records" once per turn.
